title: thelypteris distincta
intro: Thelypteris distincta, also known as the distinct lady fern, is a species of fern native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Thelypteris distincta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
